groups.title: Essentials
groups.description: Topic, goal, audience, takeaway, key info, structure, publisher, slides, CTA, tone, language.

groups.title: Content & Proof
groups.description: Category, sources, proof, story, offer, URL, must-include, restrictions.

groups.title: Brand & Visual
groups.description: Brand voice, visual system, format, imagery, colors, attribution, emoji.

groups.title: Caption & Output
groups.description: Caption length, hashtags, cover hooks, accessibility, design notes.

groups.title: Compliance
groups.description: Jurisdiction, disclosure, compliance notes, and privacy restrictions.

variables.label: Carousel topic
variables.placeholder: What professional topic will this document carousel cover?
variables.hint: One clear subject — not several unrelated ideas.

help.why: Defines the carousel’s central subject.
help.example: How small teams write honest product updates
help.avoid: Vague multi-topic briefs.

variables.label: Primary goal
variables.hint: One dominant goal for structure and CTA.

help.why: Determines progression and final CTA intensity.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Target audience
variables.placeholder: Who should read this on LinkedIn?
variables.hint: Professional role, context, and knowledge level.

help.why: Shapes vocabulary, examples, and depth.
help.example: Who should read this on LinkedIn?
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Core takeaway
variables.placeholder: What should readers remember after the last slide?
variables.hint: One central takeaway, not a list of competing messages.

help.why: Keeps every slide aligned to one outcome.
help.example: What should readers remember after the last slide?
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Key information
variables.placeholder: Facts, steps, points, or arguments the slides must cover
variables.hint: Only accurate, approved information.

help.why: Factual basis for slide content — no invention.
help.example: Facts, steps, points, or arguments the slides must cover
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Carousel structure
variables.hint: Auto picks a structure from topic and goal.

help.why: Different structures need different slide roles.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Publishing as
variables.hint: Controls first person vs organizational voice.

help.why: Perspective must match the real publisher type.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Slide count
variables.hint: Includes cover + development + final slide.

help.why: Controls depth without padding weak ideas.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: CTA objective
variables.hint: Auto chooses the least promotional action that fits the goal.

help.why: Final slide and caption CTA must stay proportional.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Tone
variables.hint: Professional LinkedIn voice without hype.

help.why: Tone changes how the same facts are received.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Output language
variables.hint: Language for slides, caption, and notes.

help.why: Cannot always be inferred from the topic.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Topic category
variables.hint: Activates extra caution for regulated subjects.

help.why: High-stakes topics need cautious wording.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Source material
variables.placeholder: Notes, research excerpts, product docs, approved drafts
variables.hint: Paste only material the slides may use.

help.why: Improves accuracy without inventing evidence.
help.example: Notes, research excerpts, product docs, approved drafts
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Verified proof points
variables.placeholder: Only verified stats, results, or credentials
variables.hint: Include context and measurement periods when known.

help.why: Prevents fabricated social proof or metrics.
help.example: Only verified stats, results, or credentials
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Example or story
variables.hint: Do not invent first-hand experience.

help.why: Story slides need real supplied narrative material.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Offer or resource
variables.placeholder: Real offer, resource, or next step if promotional
variables.hint: Only confirmed commercial or resource details.

help.why: CTA must not invent products or freebies.
help.example: Real offer, resource, or next step if promotional
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Destination URL
variables.hint: Only a real URL — never invented.

help.why: Links must be accurate when used in caption or final slide.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Must include
variables.hint: Non-negotiable content that must appear.

help.why: Prevents omission of critical messages.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Content restrictions
variables.placeholder: Topics, claims, or words to avoid
variables.hint: Brand, legal, or editorial exclusions.

help.why: User-specific bans cannot be inferred.
help.example: Topics, claims, or words to avoid
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Brand voice
variables.placeholder: How this brand or author usually sounds
variables.hint: Leave blank for a natural professional voice.

help.why: Distinctive voice cannot be guessed from topic alone.
help.example: How this brand or author usually sounds
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Visual style
variables.hint: Auto = clean professional hierarchy.

help.why: Keeps slide system consistent.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Slide format
variables.hint: Common LinkedIn document formats.

help.why: Affects layout recommendations.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Imagery preference
variables.hint: Do not request stock photos of fake customers.

help.why: Visual direction must stay producible and honest.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

options: Photo only if real asset exists

variables.label: Brand colors
variables.hint: Hex or named brand colors if known.

help.why: Supports consistent production notes.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Name or attribution
variables.hint: Subtle only — not a long signature every slide.

help.why: Attribution must match real identity.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Emoji use
variables.hint: Usually none on slides; minimal in caption if any.

help.why: Emoji preference varies by brand.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Caption length
variables.hint: Short ~300–600, Standard ~600–1200, Detailed ~1200–2000 chars.

help.why: Caption complements slides without repeating them.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Hashtag mode
variables.hint: Auto suggests 0–5 relevant tags; Custom uses only your list.

help.why: Hashtag strategy is account-specific.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Custom hashtags
variables.hint: Shown when Hashtag mode is Custom.

help.why: Campaign tags must not be invented when Custom is selected.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Cover hook options
variables.placeholder: How many cover options to generate
variables.hint: Distinct angles, not one-word swaps.

help.why: Gives cover alternatives without noise.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Accessibility text
variables.hint: Document summary + optional per-slide notes when visuals add meaning.

help.why: Supports accessible PDF / publishing workflows.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Design notes
variables.hint: Layout, hierarchy, and visual device guidance.

help.why: Helps designers produce the document consistently.
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Relevant jurisdiction
variables.placeholder: e.g. United Kingdom, EU — only if needed
variables.hint: For high-stakes topics that vary by region.

help.why: Avoids false universal legal/medical claims.
help.example: e.g. United Kingdom, EU — only if needed
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Required disclosure
variables.placeholder: Exact sponsorship / affiliation wording if required
variables.hint: Included nearly verbatim when supplied.

help.why: Commercial relationships must be transparent.
help.example: Exact sponsorship / affiliation wording if required
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Claims and compliance notes
variables.placeholder: Claim limits, required caveats, review needs
variables.hint: Anything reviewers must respect.

help.why: Prevents overclaiming on regulated subjects.
help.example: Claim limits, required caveats, review needs
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.

variables.label: Privacy restrictions
variables.placeholder: Names, clients, metrics, or data that must not appear
variables.hint: Omit or generalize protected details.

help.why: Protects confidential and personal information.
help.example: Names, clients, metrics, or data that must not appear
help.avoid: Invented stats, fake social proof, engagement bait, or private data.
